headline: T. Rowe Price (TROW) Q1 2026 Earnings Transcript
summary: Robert Sharps: Thank you, Linsley.  Before I get started, I'm pleased that [ Glenn August ], CEO of OHA and member of our Board, is with us today.  With recent volatility and broadening of markets, our active management approach, [ rooted ] in strong fundamental research and a consistent long-term focus, positions us to take advantage of the opportunities this climate brings.

raw.headline: T. Rowe Price (TROW) Q1 2026 Earnings Transcript
raw.summary: Robert Sharps: Thank you, Linsley.  Before I get started, I'm pleased that [ Glenn August ], CEO of OHA and member of our Board, is with us today.  With recent volatility and broadening of markets, our active management approach, [ rooted ] in strong fundamental research and a consistent long-term focus, positions us to take advantage of the opportunities this climate brings.
